arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca picks out three Chelsea youngsters for praise after 3-1 win over Astana as the Blues boss hails his young side for their performance
arts.sum: Marc Guiu and Renato Viega were on the scoresheet for the visitors, with an Aleksandr Marochkin own goal putting the icing on the cake to continue the Blues' perfect record.

arts.ttl: From London to Almaty: A Chelsea fan's 7,000-mile journey to watch their UEFA Conference League clash - which involved lamb heads, Lenin and 75p pints
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: Chelsea were joined by around 500 fans on their trip to Kazakhstan for Thursday's Conference League clash with Astana and it is fair to say the journey was not for the faint-hearted.

arts.ttl: Jadon Sancho details private Enzo Maresca chat after being handed clear Chelsea warning
arts.sum: Chelsea winger Jadon Sancho has insisted that he has felt the "aura" from Enzo Maresca since working with him at Stamford Bridge - also revealing what he wants him to do to keep his place in the squad. "I feel like every player understands how he wants us to work and again, personally, he's told me to just do what I usually do, go 1vs1, create space for others and just try to get into the right positions for us and to create scoring opportunities.

arts.ttl: Mykhailo Mudryk Chelsea transfer truth revealed as Bayern Munich chief breaks silence on move
arts.sum: Bayern Munich chief Max Eberl has dismissed claims that his club are currently chasing the transfer of Chelsea winger Mykhailo Mudryk - but has revealed his admiration for the Ukraine star. Mudryk has been linked with a possible January exit having started just one Premier League game all season.

arts.ttl: Secretive Chelsea investor agrees £810m deal in the US as Clearlake target multiple new takeovers
Chelsea have major problem related to unwanted 21-year-old talent
arts.sum: Chelsea will look to part ways with Carney Chukwuemeka during the January transfer window and the Blues face a major problem in trying to move the 21-year-old on. The midfielder has been with the London club since 2022 having made the transfer to Stamford Bridge as part of a £20m deal with Aston Villa. arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca salutes Chelsea youngsters after impressive away win over Astana
arts.sum: An inexperienced Blues second string eased to victory in temperatures of around minus 10

arts.ttl: 'Played in the right way': Enzo Maresca hails Chelsea player's display in 3-1 Astana win
arts.sum: Chelsea boss Enzo Maresca watched his much-changed side win away at Astana on Thursday night in Europe. Chelsea made the 3,600-mile trip to Kazakhstan and...

arts.ttl: Real Madrid to miss out: Chelsea youngster on verge of signing new contract
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid are one of a number of clubs set to be left frustrated in their pursuit of Chelsea youngster Josh Acheampong. This comes amid confirmation that…

arts.ttl: 'He's been watching Suarez' - Fringe stars show Chelsea strength in depth
arts.sum: Chelsea are in the middle of a busy December and with games every three or four days, which of their fringe players have been staking their claim for Premier League chances?
